textByHashes.238cf4947784def63cf62f2585b85a69f22c61f2: Greetings friend, and welcome here, you'll find my puzzle not so clear. Hidden amongst my words, it's true, the password for the door as a clue.
textByHashes.4d82d389e8380b1c799910e3d8eb9fed1b75c20c: Better than me, you'll not find In rhyming and in puzzles. This clue so clear will tax your mind Entirely as it confuzzles!
textByHashes.fc476bd682047e526db3c4d0bd83051177b68542: This riddle of mine may confuse, I am quite sure of that. Mayhap you should closely peruse Every word i have spat?
textByHashes.852d91ba38c806ead9ba0ee8ec9710478308d171: Feel the aching of your mind In puzzlement, confused. See the clue hidden behind His words, as you perused.
textByHashes.766f05a61de0805a1358c90e0764e01e4a775283: More than words, i have not for you Except the things i say today. Aware are you, this is a clue? Take note of what i say!
textByHashes.e9dc629c3a68be22e97abe85051cf066128e268c: Look closely at the words i speak; And study closely every part. See for yourself the word you seek Trapped for you if you're smart.
textByHashes.50c3dab7db7d0107432c26d06fb23fa97bd8f99d: Rare it is that you will see A puzzle such as this! In many ways it tickles me Now, watching you hit and miss!
textByHashes.7ae9856c2703791014d878972dec88bf21d86f3d: Before you hurry through that door Inspect the words i spoke. There is a simple hidden flaw Ere you think my rhyme a joke.
textByHashes.63b758d82a718a4a1e83c476adc7376db73829c4: Twice it is now, i have stated In a rhyme, what is the pass. Maybe my words obfuscated Entirely beyond your class.
textByHashes.5548404f4d105b9787d21eb35b0ae77163ec27d2: First my clue you did not see, I really wish you had. Such puzzling wordplay devilry Has left you kind of mad!
textByHashes.70f2b9e85fc5eb64fce4362e3672e50e4bdc6a97: Many types have passed through here Even such as you amongst their sort. And in the end, the puzzles clear; The hidden word you saught.
textByHashes.f4998c4e9c741e2e915f3a9dacd9208e43b8f516: Last time my puzzle did not help Apparently, so you've bidden. Study my speech carefully, whelp To find the answer, hidden.
textByHashes.46f582e8510109f1670566fb52331721abcdc13f: Repetition, once again Against good sense it goes. In my words, the answers plain Now that you see rhyme flows.
textByHashes.39ad5c0180bdf1f990e599eb5fe2665cde80e88e: Betrayed by words the answer is In that what i say is the key There is no more help after this Especially no more from me.
textByHashes.572fdd42d8ccccbf1ccf92b343f92288d60cb649: Three times now, my riddle said; I hope you finally see the clue. Maybe think on what you've read; Easy when you know what to do.
textByHashes.121e503df6999efd31258a7f30478faf3e5ea3be: For the last time i will state In simple words, the clue. Such tricky words make you irate Having no idea what to do...
textByHashes.c4864519b36605ca8e97be353da13eef27fe5d4f: Maybe i will do my best; Especially at giving clues. Attempt to help you pass the test! That should help me pay my dues.
textByHashes.f3fc5eaa5f2b2961ebb14964feab7ce52c70ea76: Lo! my final speech is now Attended to by you. Study my words, and find out how To understand my clue!
textByHashes.b6f03259097067a0d0550a49af258c3e19ec6717: Repeat myself to give the clue Again, i now do speak. It's hidden in my words - hey you! Now find the answer you seek.
textByHashes.79f731a6b26d8cd0928fec194aa6e4fb8299a056: Your wit is sharp, your brains quite clear; You solved my puzzle with no fear. At puzzles I rank you quite the best, now enter the portal for your next test.
textByHashes.34ebf2c7c49e21a467e6aa61a03bf95d15579cf6: It's sad to say, this test beat you. I'll send you to Tiffy, what to do?
